description:
Create an Observation log in farmOS Field Kit to document a monthly livestock weigh-in session for November 15, 2024. Record a quantity of 6 with the unit 'head' and label 'animals weighed'. The notes field must contain exactly:
Monthly weigh-in - Beef cattle demonstration herd
Animal #12: 485 kg
Animal #18: 512 kg
Animal #23: 467 kg
Animal #31: 498 kg
Animal #45: 520 kg
Animal #07: 475 kg
Average weight: 493 kg
